headlines.title: US Hits Iran-Flagged Oil Tankers While Peace Talks Continue
headlines.summary: U.S. forces struck two empty Iranian-flagged oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman on Friday, escalating pressure on Tehran’s shipping network even as Washington says a potential deal to halt the war could be close.
